name: veriffica-question-bank
description: Implementation-ready question bank for Veriffica MVP, linked to questionGroups by groupId.

questions.label: Leaks
Leakage around the oil filler wrench
Leaks around the engine block

Water marks on the oil dipstick
Sludge on the oil plug
Metal filings on the oil indicator
Black coating
Traces of soot

Traces of metal filings around the high-pressure pump
Wet injectors or smell of diesel fuel in the engine bay
Cracked or hardened return fuel hoses
Glow plug indicator does not behave normally after turning the ignition on
Excessive waxy deposits around the fuel filter in cold weather
Corrosion of the fuel pump
Corrosion of the fuel tank
Dirty fuel filter
Damaged orange high-voltage cables or missing protective covers
Warning labels missing in the engine bay or service access areas
Traces of impact, dents or deformation near the traction battery housing
Evidence of moisture, corrosion or dirt around high-voltage connectors
Strong chemical smell near the battery area after opening the car
Charging port flap damaged or does not close properly
Visible corrosion, burns or bent pins in the charging port
Charging cable insulation damaged or plug casing cracked
Portable charger missing or obviously damaged (if included in the sale)
Frayed belts
Cracked belts
Deflected belts (about 1 cm or less)
Deformation of pulleys
Broken compressor belt
Transmission fluid leak under the gearbox area
Burnt smell around the transmission fluid dipstick or filler area (if accessible)
Selector positions on the lever are worn or not clearly engaging
Leaks around transfer case or rear differential
Torn driveshaft or axle rubber boots
Noticeable play in the prop shaft when checked by hand
Roof fabric or panels damaged, cracked or torn
Moisture marks near roof seals or top edge of windshield
Roof opens or closes unevenly (if test is possible)
Side windows do not align with roof seals
Cracked or damaged plastic underbody covers
Damaged side steps or rocker area from off-road impacts
Uneven wear or damage on lower bumpers and splash shields
Sliding door rollers noisy, sticking or misaligned
Rear cargo floor bent, cracked or patched
Signs of water leaks in the cargo area
Bulkhead or cargo tie-down points visibly damaged
Load bed floor heavily bent or patched
Tailgate cables, hinges or latches damaged
Corrosion under bed liner or around wheel arches
Bed and cabin alignment visibly uneven
signs of corrosion of the suspension
cracked rubber parts
Slow return to vertical when force is applied over the shock absorber
Wear less than 1.6mm or TW1 point
Uneven tire wear
Bubbles, cracks, scratches, etc.
Traces of corrosion
Heavily worn driver's seat upholstery
Sagging driver seat
Broken driver's seat springs
Visible wipe of the driver's seat from the door side
Both sets of keys worn out
Driver's belt tensioner springs are weak
Worn steering wheel
Steering wheel in better condition than the interior of the car
Worn marks on light switches
Worn pedal covers or new pedal covers
Worn or noticeably new stick shift
Shifter guard cracked
Cracked shifters sound deadening
Water marks
Moisture
Musty smell
Burnt upholstery
Dirty ashtray
Interior and exterior lighting is not working
Air vents are not working
Central locking not working (if applicable)
Electric mirrors not working (if applicable)
Radio not working (if applicable)
Electric windows not working (if applicable)
Sunroof not working (if applicable)
Backlash when turning the steering wheel
a knock while pulling and pushing the steering wheel diagonally from right to left
a knock coming from the bottom of the car when shaking the steering wheel rapidly left and right
Before starting the engine, the indicator lamps are off when the key is turned
The engine starts more than 3 s after turning the key
Rasp and metal noises when turning the key
No start-up after turning the key
indicator lamps on after starting the engine
Rough idling
Excessive smoke immediately after cold start
Engine shakes strongly for the first seconds after starting
Glow plug or engine management warning remains on after start
The car does not enter READY / drive-ready mode after start procedure
High-voltage system warning light remains on after power-up
Main display shows charging system, battery or isolation fault messages
Unusually loud cooling fan starts immediately after power-up on a cold car
A whistling sound is heard when the wheels turn fully
Vibration of plastic parts in the cabin
Delay or strong jerk when shifting from P to D or R with the brake applied
Selector cannot be moved smoothly through all positions
After removing the oil plug and/or dipstick, visible oil splashes and smoke from the engine
Smoke in the engine compartment or a strong smell of exhaust gases
Oily and black deposits on the tip of the exhaust pipe
Blue exhaust
White exhaust
Black exhaust from gasoline engine (not applicable to diesel engines)
The car starts in third gear
Clutch catches low or high
Gear stick shakes
Imprecise gears
Hearable creaks
Delay when moving off after selecting D or R
Noticeable jerks during upshifts or downshifts
Gear hunting or frequent unnecessary shifts at steady speed
Transmission slips under acceleration (engine revs rise but speed does not)
Noticeable loss of power above medium speed
Excessive black smoke under acceleration
DPF / emissions warning appears during the drive
Rear suspension knocks
Swaying on bumps
Lack of traction after braking
Drift after releasing the steering wheel
Loss of traction on the turns
Whining as speed increases
Jerky transition between regenerative braking and friction braking
Noticeable vibration or humming from the battery area during acceleration
Sudden drop of available power shown on the dashboard
State-of-charge drops unusually fast during a short drive
Excessive brake pedal travel
Brake not responding
Brake heating
Steering wheel and brake pedal tremble when braking
Springing and deep pressure on the brake pedal
Wheel lock when braking with ABS (If equipped)
Drift when braking
Increased oil consumption and emissions from the exhaust system
Loud operation and metallic sound
Turbocharger only turns on above a certain speed
Compressor whistling excessively loud as engine speed increases
Binding, hopping or heavy resistance during slow full-lock turns on dry ground
Knocking or vibration from the center tunnel during acceleration
4WD warning light appears during the drive

Gas installation documentation
Gas cylinder approval
LPG entry in the registration certificate

Charging cable(s) and charging adapter(s) included in the sale
Documentation for replaced traction battery modules (if applicable)
Documentation for high-voltage system service campaigns or recalls (if applicable)
Bills and invoices for all repairs
Mileage in the booklet matches the odometer reading
Information on servicing the car at an authorized service station throughout its lifetime
